data.content: Implementation complete. Default workflow profile is persisted via the existing defaults.profileId setting and applied at all beat-creation paths through a shared resolver (src/lib/profile-defaults.ts:resolveDefaultProfile). Settings UI shows a visible error when the saved profile is no longer in the live kno profile list. CreateBeatDialog and POST /api/beats both consult settings at creation time and fall back to the first live workflow with no hardcoded autopilot fallback remaining. Tests: src/lib/__tests__/profile-defaults.test.ts (resolver) and src/lib/__tests__/beats-route-default-profile.test.ts (API). Lint, typecheck, full test suite (2772 pass), and build all green. Review artifact: branch worktree-foolery-77d8-default-profile pushed to origin.
